summary: POS Void/Delete Feature Testing Complete. All 11 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend testing verified: Transaction History dialog shows active count with 'Show voided' checkbox, active transactions display green 'Active' badge with Print/Void(X)/Delete buttons, void dialog opens with reason input required before confirmation, voided transactions display 'VOIDED' badge with strikethrough and dimmed styling, delete dialog shows 'Permanently Delete' warning with restore inventory notice.

backend_api.PUT /api/pos/invoices/{id}/void: Voids transaction with reason, sets is_voided=true, voided_at, voided_by, voided_by_name, void_reason. Reverses account balances and restores inventory
backend_api.PUT /api/pos/invoices/{id}/void (already: Returns 400 Bad Request with 'already voided' message
backend_api.PUT /api/pos/invoices/{id}/void (default: Uses 'Voided by admin' as default reason
backend_api.DELETE /api/pos/invoices/{id}: Hard deletes transaction, linked voucher, and restores inventory
backend_api.GET /api/pos/transactions: Returns transactions with void fields (is_voided, voided_at, voided_by, voided_by_name, void_reason)
backend_api.GET /api/pos/transactions/{id}: Returns single transaction with all void fields

frontend.history_dialog: Transaction History dialog opens with active transactions count
frontend.show_voided_checkbox: Checkbox with voided count (X) toggles visibility of voided transactions
frontend.active_badge: Green 'Active' badge displayed on active transactions
frontend.active_row_buttons: Print, Void (X icon), Delete (trash icon) buttons on active transactions
frontend.void_reason_input: data-testid='void-reason-input' required field with placeholder text
frontend.voided_styling: line-through on receipt/total, opacity-50 on row
frontend.delete_dialog: 'Permanently Delete' title with warning about audit trail
frontend.delete_warning: Shows 'Use Void instead to keep audit trail' message

critical_code_review_comments: Fixed missing void fields in POSTransactionResponse schema (is_voided, voided_at, voided_by, voided_by_name, void_reason) - was preventing API from returning void data
seed_data_creation: Test transactions created during backend tests with prefix 'TEST_VOID_ITEM' for void/delete testing. Some voided during tests.
context_for_next_testing_agent: POS Void/Delete feature fully tested. Backend has PUT /invoices/{id}/void endpoint (requires admin, takes reason query param, reverses balances and inventory). DELETE endpoint does hard-delete. Frontend history dialog has 'Show voided' checkbox, void dialog with reason input, delete dialog with warning. All data-testids verified: void-btn, void-dialog, void-reason-input, confirm-void-btn, confirm-delete-btn, history-table. Fixed POSTransactionResponse schema to include void fields.
bug_fix_applied: Added missing void fields (is_voided, voided_at, voided_by, voided_by_name, void_reason) to POSTransactionResponse schema in /app/backend/models/schemas.py to ensure API returns void data correctly
